value.author: codex-sdk-cli-continuation
value.text: CI review-loop fix for PR #113 static gate: remote contracts:check failed because scripts/contracts-snapshot.mjs inherited local PM_GLOBAL_PATH/global extensions when generating the golden fixture. That polluted tests/fixtures/contracts/full.json with a user-global beads import command that CI correctly did not have. Hardened scripts/contracts-snapshot.mjs to run pm contracts with an isolated temporary PM_GLOBAL_PATH, regenerated tests/fixtures/contracts/full.json from the deterministic clean surface, and verified locally: pnpm contracts:check; pnpm quality:static; pnpm quality:docs-skills; pnpm changelog:pm:check; git diff --check. Timestamp-only pm-changelog managed-extension churn restored before staging.

value.author: codex-sdk-cli-continuation
value.text: Reviewer follow-up for PR #113: addressed Gemini robustness findings. Changes: processRpcLine now rejects non-object/non-array JSON-RPC payloads with -32600 instead of crashing on null; detectUnexpectedTopLevelKeys defensively returns no warnings for non-object args; createSerialQueue.idle now waits on an explicit pending count/drain waiter so it cannot resolve while tasks enqueued during active drain remain pending; scripts/contracts-snapshot.mjs now reports spawnSync startup errors explicitly, guards stderr/stdout writes, and still cleans isolated PM_GLOBAL_PATH in finally. Regression coverage added for processRpcLine('null') invalid-request response and idle waiting through a task enqueued while active. Local verification passed: pnpm build; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/shared-helpers.spec.ts tests/integration/mcp-handshake.spec.ts tests/unit/contracts-command.spec.ts (43 tests); pnpm typecheck; pnpm contracts:check; pnpm quality:static; git diff --check.

value.author: codex-sdk-cli-continuation
value.text: Reviewer follow-up for PR #113 current-head Gemini finding: JSON-RPC notifications (requests without an id member) now suppress both success and error responses in processRpcLine, while malformed non-object payloads still return invalid-request with id null. Added regression coverage for tools/list and unsupported-method notifications writing no stdout. Local verification passed: pnpm build; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/mcp-handshake.spec.ts tests/unit/shared-helpers.spec.ts (25 tests); pnpm typecheck; pnpm quality:static.

Local verification passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/shared-helpers.spec.ts tests/integration/mcp-handshake.spec.ts (26 tests); pnpm typecheck; git diff --check; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (139 files, 2318 tests, 100% statements/branches/functions/lines).
